findings.description: Critical: D8 copies a wheel into the Docker context and sets UV_FIND_LINKS, but D5 still declares gen-eval as an explicit editable path source. Without also ignoring tool.uv.sources in the Docker sync, uv will still try to resolve ../packages/gen-eval, which is outside the agent-coordinator build context.
findings.resolution: Update D8/task 4.5 to change the Dockerfile's uv sync command to use the wheel path explicitly, e.g. `uv sync --no-sources --all-extras --no-dev --no-install-project` with `UV_FIND_LINKS=/tmp/wheels`, or an equivalent Docker-only pyproject/source override. Add a validation step that builds with only `agent-coordinator/` as context and no parent package source available.

findings.description: Critical: The Railway path is still not executable as written: dist/ is ignored, railway.toml is unchanged, and the plan only says Railway will run uv build via an unspecified buildCommand or README note. A remote Railway Docker build rooted at agent-coordinator will not have agent-coordinator/dist/gen_eval-*.whl unless a tracked prebuild mechanism exists.
findings.resolution: Make the Railway wheel-generation mechanism explicit and tracked: either update Railway service configuration/railway.toml to use a supported prebuild flow, switch Railway to a shared monorepo root context, or choose a Docker strategy that builds/copies the package source inside the Docker build. Add a task and verification that simulate a clean Railway checkout with no preexisting dist/ wheel.

findings.description: Critical: Integration task 7.4 contradicts Option B by building with repo root context (`.`), while D8 says the proof must use `agent-coordinator/` context. With the planned `COPY dist/gen_eval-*.whl`, root context looks for `dist/` at the repo root and does not prove the Railway-compatible build path.
findings.resolution: Change task 7.4 and wp-integration's docker smoke command to `docker build -f agent-coordinator/Dockerfile -t agent-coordinator:gen-eval-test agent-coordinator/`, and ensure the prebuilt wheel is generated under `agent-coordinator/dist/` immediately before that command.

findings.description: Critical: Task 5.2 updates validate-feature's module invocation but not its descriptor discovery path. After D7 relocates descriptors to `evaluation/descriptors/`, validate-feature's old `*/evaluation/gen_eval/descriptors/*.yaml` glob can silently skip gen-eval coverage, and the planned grep only catches dotted `evaluation.gen_eval` strings, not slash paths.
findings.resolution: Expand D9 and task 5.2 to update validate-feature descriptor discovery to the relocated consumer-controlled descriptor path, and add verification for both `evaluation.gen_eval` and `evaluation/gen_eval` legacy strings across canonical skills and runtime mirrors.

findings.description: D3's surgical extraction of only GenEvalMetrics is now coherent with the dependency boundary, and task 2.4.1 gives that decision an enforceable regression test.
findings.resolution: No action required; keep this shape during implementation.
